# Abdulrahman Perfumes

> UAE-blended, designer-inspired fragrances bottled and shipped from Sydney, Australia. Every 50ml eau de parfum is $41.50 — buy 2, save 15%.

Abdulrahman Perfumes crafts long-lasting oud, amber, fresh and floral scents inspired by luxury designer fragrances at a fraction of the price. All perfumes are alcohol-based eau de parfum, blended in the UAE and quality-checked in Sydney. Free metro shipping over $50 AUD.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured fragrances, bestsellers, brand story.
- [Shop all perfumes](/shop): Full collection — filter by designer brand, category and price.
- [Scent Discovery quiz](/scent-discovery): 4-question quiz that recommends a fragrance based on mood, occasion and projection.
- [About us](/about): How our perfumes are made — sourcing, blending and packing.
- [Wholesale enquiries](/wholesale): Bulk-order form for retailers and resellers.
- [Contact us](/contact): Help with orders, returns and product questions.
- [Shipping policy](/shipping): Australia-wide tracked shipping, dispatch times, free-shipping thresholds.
- [Returns policy](/returns): 30-day returns on unopened bottles.

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](/privacy)
- [Terms & conditions](/terms)
